title: Chris Dorland
compiled_truth: Chris Dorland is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-21), Chris Dorland sent 1493 and received 533 emails, totalling 2026 interactions. Top correspondents: [Dan Dorland](people/dan-dorland) (141), [Mmolloy](people/mmolloy-oebi) (86), [Kdorland](people/kdorland-titanelectric) (82), [Bgabrielson](people/bgabrielson-cdnam) (75), [Ddorland](people/ddorland-smednet) (70).
